parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Sort order for results (e.g. added_asc, added_desc, name_asc, name_desc)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit Per Page records count. will allow maximum up to 100 and default will be 20

post.description: Search Opportunities based on combinations of advanced filters. Documentation Link - https://doc.clickup.com/8631005/d/h/87cpx-424216/7bf11bc9b94f80f

parameters.name: locationId
parameters.description: Identifier of the location (sub-account) to retrieve pipelines for

delete.description: Allows removal of one or all followers from an opportunity.

parameters.name: isRemoveAllFollowers
parameters.description: Set to true to remove all followers from the opportunity

info.title: Opportunities API v3
info.description:
Documentation for Opportunities API

## API Version v3

All APIs available via `/v3` route prefix with AIP-compliant responses.

bearer.name: Authorization
bearer.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Sub-Account (OR) Private Integration Token of Sub-Account.

Location-Access.name: Authorization
Location-Access.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Sub-Account (OR) Private Integration Token of Sub-Account.

Location-Access-Only.name: Authorization
Location-Access-Only.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Sub-Account.

Agency-Access.name: Authorization
Agency-Access.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Agency (OR) Private Integration Token of Agency.

Agency-Access-Only.name: Authorization
Agency-Access-Only.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Agency.

lostReasons.description: List of lost reasons for the location

total.description: Total number of lost reasons matching the query

companyName.description: Company name associated with the contact

id.description: Unique identifier of the custom field

fieldValue.description: The value of the custom field

assignedTo.description: Identifier of the user the opportunity is assigned to

indexVersion.description: Index version of the opportunity record

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the opportunity was last updated

forecastExpectedCloseDate.description: Expected close date for the forecast (YYYY-MM-DD)

forecastOriginalCloseDate.description: Original forecast close date before any slippage (YYYY-MM-DD)

forecastSlippageCount.description: Number of times the close date has slipped

forecastDaysSlipped.description: Total days the close date has slipped

forecastLastSlippedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last close-date slip

effectiveProbability.description: Effective win probability after stage and forecast adjustments (0–100)

calendarEvents.description: Calendar events attached to the opportunity

customFields.description: Custom fields associated with the opportunity

total.description: Total number of opportunities matching the query

opportunities.description: List of opportunities matching the search criteria

unReadConversations.description: Include unread conversations count in the response

additionalDetails.description: Flags to include additional related entities in the response
